title: deer-flow.council.profile.applied v1
description: A council deliberation began with a resolved profile binding. Emitted exactly once at the start of profile-mode deliberation so SSE subscribers and stack-tuner can correlate downstream persona completions with the active profile. Producer: backend/packages/harness/deerflow/bus.py::emit_council_profile_applied. Subject is deliberation_id.

personas.description: persona-name → model-name mapping for this run

merger.description: model the merger will use to synthesize the final answer

fallbacks_used.description: fallback model names already in play at start (typically empty; populated when a prior attempt 429'd)
